mutation_checks.description: the projection row count stops matching the canonical preimage
mutation_checks.label: row_count_drift

mutation_checks.description: the projection log size no longer equals ilog2(row_count)
mutation_checks.label: log_size_drift

mutation_checks.description: the canonical row ordering is changed
mutation_checks.label: row_order_drift

mutation_checks.description: one projection row label is replaced with a different label
mutation_checks.label: row_replacement

mutation_checks.description: the Phase43 source surface version drifts
mutation_checks.label: source_surface_version_drift

mutation_checks.description: the canonical preimage loses required fields or rows
mutation_checks.label: canonical_preimage_truncation

mutation_checks.description: the binding surface no longer behaves like a canonical source-root binding
mutation_checks.label: binding_alias_drift
